title: wolftpm: unused log dep in Cargo.toml
description: wolftpm/Cargo.toml lists log = '0.4' as a dependency but no code in wolftpm/src/ uses it (grep confirms zero log:: / use log / extern crate log hits). This is dead code per project rules, increases build time, and misleads maintainers who might look for logging calls that don't exist. Remove the dep.
